acceptance_criteria.text: SQLite database at trello/data/kanban.db with columns and cards tables (correct schema, FK, cascade delete)
GET /api/columns returns all columns with nested cards ordered by position
POST /api/columns creates a column with auto-assigned position; PATCH updates title; DELETE cascades cards
POST /api/cards creates a card with auto-assigned position; PATCH updates title/description/columnId/position with reordering; DELETE reorders remaining
Board auto-seeds 3 default columns (To Do, In Progress, Done) on first load
Kanban board UI: horizontal columns, styled cards with shadow/rounded corners, Trello-like color scheme, responsive
Add/edit card modal with title input, description textarea, validation (empty title rejected), Save/Cancel buttons
HTML5 drag-and-drop: move cards between columns and reorder within, visual feedback (semi-transparent drag, drop zone highlight), position persisted via API
Column management: add column button, inline rename on click, delete with cascade confirmation
Edge cases: empty board message, empty column message, long title/description truncation, duplicate column titles allowed
